# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "metadata": {
    "description": "ARM templates cannot create Microsoft Entra ID applications/service principals or Azure AD role assignments. Use a managed identity or create the service principal outside ARM and pass its objectId into this template. This template assigns least-privilege roles to an existing principal."
  },
  "parameters": {
    "principalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of an existing service principal, managed identity, or user."
      }
    },
    "principalType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "ServicePrincipal",
      "allowedValues": [
        "ServicePrincipal",
        "User",
        "Group",
        "ForeignGroup",
        "Device"
      ]
    },
    "assignmentScope": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().id]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Scope for role assignments. Defaults to current subscription."
      }
    },
    "roleDefinitionIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of built-in or custom role definition resource IDs to assign. Default is Contributor. Consider replacing with narrower roles for CI/CD."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "roleAssignmentGuids": "[range(0, length(parameters('roleDefinitionIds')))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "roleAssignmentsCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('roleDefinitionIds'))]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "scope": "[parameters('assignmentScope')]",
      "name": "[guid(parameters('assignmentScope'), parameters('principalObjectId'), parameters('roleDefinitionIds')[copyIndex()])]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[parameters('roleDefinitionIds')[copyIndex()]]",
        "principalId": "[parameters('principalObjectId')]",
        "principalType": "[parameters('principalType')]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "assignedPrincipalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('principalObjectId')]"
    },
    "assignedRoles": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": "[parameters('roleDefinitionIds')]"
    },
    "assignedScope": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('assignmentScope')]"
    }
  }
}
